title: dubautia syndetica
intro: Dubautia syndetica is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the makoi or Hawaiian makoi, and is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its use as an anti-arthritic agent. Dubautia syndetica can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a medical professional.
